title: Non-record: 10L FP16-Embed + Warmdown20k
body:
Built on the merged `2026-03-19_SlidingWindow_FP16Emb_10L_MuonWD_OvertoneInit` baseline.

  Main change:
  - increase `WARMDOWN_ITERS` from `2500` to `20000`

  Result:
  - post-roundtrip `val_bpb: 1.17389939`
  - pre-roundtrip `val_bpb: 1.2055`
  - artifact `14122782` bytes
  - total submission size `14178772` bytes
